*** START OF THE PROJECT GUTENBERG EBOOK CI SNIPPET ***

Chapter one. The wind rose over the moor and carried the scent of rain.
A traveller paused at the gate and wondered whether the house beyond
the hill still held a welcome fire.

Chapter two. By evening the road had narrowed to a single track of
stones worn smooth by carts and footsteps. Every word in this file is
deliberately plain so CI can split small chunks without downloading
from Project Gutenberg.

*** END OF THE PROJECT GUTENBERG EBOOK CI SNIPPET ***
